content:
- **::G4M3.ARCH1V3** — interactive lorebooks, choose-your-path essays, RPG lore mode

---

### VI. Automation + Translation Systems

Every object can be:
- Translated (languages: ENG, SPN, FRA, JAP, LAT, GAE, etc.)
- Rendered in alternate programming languages
- Mutated across: word > sentence > image > sound > app > ritual
- Auto-tagged, auto-versioned, remixed, re-archived

---

### VII. Output Formats & Faces

**Internal:**
- GitHub documentation (for public + private build logs)
- Artistic manifestos (internal + performance-use)
- Archive records + encoded texts

**External:**
- eBooks / zines / essays
- Video series / podcasts
- Modular templates, toolkits
